name: Homologous Recombination Repair
description: Homologous recombination repair: a double-strand break is resected to 3' ssDNA, coated by RPA then RAD51, which searches for a homologous template and invades it, with resolution via double-Holliday-junction or SDSA for accurate repair.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Double-strand break"]
    N2["MRN detects break"]
    N3["5' resection -> 3' ssDNA"]
    N4["RPA coats ssDNA"]
    N5["RAD51 filament (BRCA2)"]
    N6["Homology search + invasion"]
    N7["D-loop; DNA synthesis"]
    N8{"Resolution pathway?"}
    N9["Double Holliday junction"]
    N10["SDSA (non-crossover)"]
    N11["Accurate repair restored"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 --> N3
    N3 --> N4
    N4 --> N5
    N5 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N7 --> N8
    N8 -->|dHJ| N9
    N8 -->|SDSA| N10
    N9 --> N11
    N10 --> N11

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff

nodeDetails.detail: MRN complex senses and initiates processing

nodeDetails.label: RAD51 filament (BRCA2)
nodeDetails.detail: RAD51 replaces RPA to form the presynaptic filament

nodeDetails.label: D-loop; DNA synthesis
nodeDetails.detail: Extension primed from the invading strand
